name: Minecraft: Fabric
author: ops@refx.example
description: Fabric mod-loader Minecraft Java Edition server. Lightweight, fast-updating modding platform — pair with the Fabric API for most mods.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl jq
cd /mnt/server
MC_VER="${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
LOADER="${LOADER_VERSION}"
if [ "$MC_VER" = "latest" ]; then
  MC_VER=$(curl -fsSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/game | jq -r '[.[] | select(.stable==true)][0].version')
fi
if [ "$LOADER" = "latest" ] || [ "$LOADER" = "recommended" ]; then
  LOADER=$(curl -fsSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader | jq -r '[.[] | select(.stable==true)][0].version')
fi
INSTALLER=$(curl -fsSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/installer | jq -r '[.[] | select(.stable==true)][0].version')
echo "Installing Fabric: minecraft=${MC_VER} loader=${LOADER} installer=${INSTALLER}"
curl -fsSL -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader/${MC_VER}/${LOADER}/${INSTALLER}/server/jar"
if [ "${EULA}" = "true" ]; then echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt; fi
echo 'Install complete.'

variables.description: The name of the Fabric server launcher jarfile to run the server with.
The Minecraft version to install Fabric for. Use 'latest' for the newest stable release.
The Fabric loader version. Use 'latest' for the newest stable loader.
Maximum Java heap size in megabytes (-Xmx).
You must accept the Mojang EULA to run a server.

longDescription: Lightweight Fabric mod loader for fast, modern Minecraft modpacks. Ideal for performance mods and curated experiences.
